summary: All 7 metrics verified against web sources. No deviation exceeded the 20% mismatch threshold. The revenue figure was the closest at 18.1% deviation, attributable to the facts bundle using an Oct 2025 report period predating NVIDIA's Q4 FY2026 earnings (Feb 2026) which reported $215.9B full-year revenue. All other metrics (net_margin, operating_margin, pe_ratio, market_cap, roe, roa) were within 0.7-12% of current web consensus — well within normal timing and methodology variance.
